ValidationRule.description: Name of the Opportunity Bundle shouldn't contain default value anymore on updates.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
OpportunityBundleName__c = "Please fill in the name for this Opportunity Bundle", NOT( ISNEW() ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please change the Name of the Opportunity Bundle. (OBU001)
